name: Default Browser & File Type Associations
categoryDescription: Application installation, execution history, compatibility configuration, and OS version information.
description: Default web browser configuration and registered internet client applications — maps URL protocols and Start Menu internet clients to specific browser executables.
forensic_value: Replacement of the HTTP handler with a malicious binary causes all web link clicks to execute the attacker's code. Unexpected entries in StartMenuInternet pointing outside Program Files indicate a browser impersonation persistence technique.
